title: ononis angustissima subsp. falcata
intro: Ononis angustissima subsp. falcata, also known as narrow-leaved spiny restharrow, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its narrow leaves and spiny stems. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots which contain isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ononis angustissima subsp. falcata include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can contribute to reducing the risk of certain diseases. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in infusions to leverage its medicinal properties.
